reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: a research-based long-term vision for an 'intelligent nation'
reactions.public_good_frame: policy should follow the evidence even when the evidence is uncomfortable
reactions.argument: A fairer gate reduces harm but the documented proposal this archetype draws on removes the gate: selection at 10 or 12 has no demonstrated benefit to justify keeping it in any form.
reactions.condition_to_change: Acceptable only as a stopgap with a legislated end-date.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.basis: Egyensúly Intézet: Hogyan legyünk okos nemzet? (2021), 3.5
reactions.interest: a research-based long-term vision for an 'intelligent nation'
reactions.public_good_frame: policy should follow the evidence even when the evidence is uncomfortable
reactions.argument: A gradual phase-down moves toward the documented proposal this archetype draws on: a uniformly 8-year primary stage with no selective exit ramps.
reactions.condition_to_change: The end-state (no selection before 14) must be stated, not implied.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.basis: Egyensúly Intézet: Hogyan legyünk okos nemzet? (2021), 3.5
reactions.interest: a research-based long-term vision for an 'intelligent nation'
reactions.public_good_frame: policy should follow the evidence even when the evidence is uncomfortable
reactions.argument: The documented, published position this archetype draws on: research shows early selection yields no gains in later outcomes while reproducing poverty (Gurzó-Horn).
reactions.condition_to_change: Pair with the proposed incentives: reward heterogeneous intake in school evaluation.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.basis: 2021 proposal: standards + equity ranking as complements
reactions.interest: a research-based long-term vision for an 'intelligent nation'
reactions.public_good_frame: policy should follow the evidence even when the evidence is uncomfortable
reactions.argument: The documented proposal this archetype draws on also proposed standards and targeted support — but as complements; compensation alone leaves the selection machine running.
reactions.condition_to_change: Acceptable as phase one if selection reform is scheduled behind it.
